title: Text Decoration Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of CSS text decoration properties and their values
referenceSolutions: text-decoration: none removes underlines from links

hints.text: Think about what 'text-decoration' does by default on anchor tags.
Links have an underline by default. The property that controls this is 'text-decoration'.
text-decoration: none removes the underline from links. Other values include underline, overline, and line-through.
